title: AKH® Dad Trophy Foil Balloon | 34"x26" (86CM x 66CM) with a Plastic Inflating Tube & Ribbon | Happy Father’s Day Decorations Happy Birthday DAD Balloon | Father's Day party balloons decorations
features: Dimensions: Measures approximately 34" x 26"(86cm x 66cm) - perfect size for Father's Day celebrations.
Product Specification: Made of high-quality foil material for durability and long-lasting inflation.
Special Features: Features a vibrant design with "Dad" trophy motif, adding a festive touch to Father's Day decorations.
Easy Inflation: Can be easily inflated with air or helium for floating effect (helium inflation requires a helium tank or pump).
Versatile Decoration: Ideal for Father's Day parties, celebrations, or as a thoughtful gift for dads.
